name: web-veloxis
description: 大川激流 Veloxis 官网 monorepo: 主站 (静态 HTML) + 业务板块 SPA (apps/*)

scripts.install:apps: npm --prefix apps/roadmap install && npm --prefix apps/industry install
scripts.build:all: npm run build:roadmap && npm run build:industry
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:roadmap && npm run deploy:industry
